expectations.text: Correctly warns that Azure Key Vault converts underscores to hyphens (DATABASE_URL becomes DATABASE-URL)
expectations.evidence: "Azure Key Vault naming constraints: Only alphanumeric characters (a-z, A-Z, 0-9) and hyphens (-) are permitted...Underscores are not allowed"

expectations.text: Lists required permissions: secrets/list, secrets/get, secrets/set, and secrets/recover
expectations.evidence: Lists permissions table but does NOT include secrets/recover. Shows: 'secrets/set or secrets/createOrUpdate', 'secrets/get', 'secrets/delete', 'secrets/list', 'secrets/backup', 'secrets/restore' - missing secrets/recover specifically

expectations.text: Recommends Key Vault Secrets Officer role as the appropriate built-in role
expectations.evidence: "Minimum Built-in Role: Assign your service principal the Key Vault Secrets Officer role"

expectations.text: Explains why secrets/recover is needed (Azure soft-delete behavior)
expectations.evidence: Does not mention secrets/recover or explain Azure soft-delete behavior and why recovery permissions are needed
Does not use the term 'App Connection'. Discusses setting up service principal with credentials but not within Infisical's App Connection context

expectations.text: Mentions the vault base URL as a required destination config field
expectations.evidence: Does not mention vault base URL as a required field in the destination configuration
